# Milestone v1.5: SEO/GEO & API Integration

**Status:** SHIPPED 2026-02-25
**Phases:** 14-20
**Total Plans:** 18

## Overview

Sites built with Genorah are discoverable and rankable by default -- search engines, AI engines, and social platforms all see correct metadata, structured data, and fresh content signals. External API integration patterns enable CRM forms, webhooks, and third-party services without exposing secrets.

## Phases

### Phase 14: Core SEO Foundation

**Goal**: Every page generated by Genorah has correct, complete SEO metadata -- framework-native, no deprecated libraries, honest about SPA limitations
**Depends on**: Phase 13 (v1 complete)
**Plans**: 2 plans

Plans:
- [x] 14-PLAN-01.md -- SKILL.md Layers 1-2: Decision Guidance with framework capability matrix + complete code patterns for all 8 requirements
- [x] 14-PLAN-02.md -- SKILL.md Layers 3-4 + Machine-Readable Constraints + appendix-ai-bots.md AI crawler taxonomy

**Details:**
Requirements: SEO-01 through SEO-08 (8 requirements)
Success Criteria:
  1. Rewritten seo-meta skill (Core tier) with framework-native APIs (no react-helmet, no next-seo)
  2. Dynamic canonical URL generation with mandatory metadataBase
  3. XML sitemap and sitemap index valid for GSC and Bing Webmaster Tools
  4. robots.txt with AI crawler taxonomy distinguishing search bots from training bots
  5. Framework capability matrix honestly disclosing SPA limitations

### Phase 15: Structured Data & GEO

**Goal**: Sites appear in Google rich results and AI engine citations through typed structured data and GEO-optimized content patterns woven into the Emotional Arc
**Depends on**: Phase 14
**Plans**: 2 plans

Plans:
- [x] 15-PLAN-01.md -- SKILL.md Layers 1-2: Decision Guidance with schema status matrix + code patterns for all structured data types, GEO content patterns, and schema audit protocol
- [x] 15-PLAN-02.md -- SKILL.md Layers 3-4: SEO-Emotional Arc beat mapping, archetype-to-GEO intensity mapping + anti-patterns + machine-readable constraints

**Details:**
Requirements: SDATA-01 through SDATA-06, GEO-01 through GEO-05 (11 requirements)
Success Criteria:
  1. Typed JSON-LD patterns for all major page types (FAQ, HowTo, Article, Organization, etc.)
  2. GEO content structuring patterns with archetype-aware guidance
  3. SEO-Emotional Arc integration mapping beats to SEO/GEO guidance
  4. Post-iteration schema audit protocol (SDATA-06)
  5. AI crawler guidance distinguishing training bots from search bots

### Phase 16: Indexing & Search Visibility

**Goal**: New and updated pages discoverable within minutes -- IndexNow for Bing/Yandex/Naver, sitemaps for Google, and forward-looking standards (llms.txt)
**Depends on**: Phase 14
**Plans**: 3 plans

Plans:
- [x] 16-PLAN-01.md -- SKILL.md Layers 1-2A: Decision Guidance + IndexNow auto-setup patterns with content-hash tracking
- [x] 16-PLAN-02.md -- AI crawler taxonomy appendix (three-tier presets) + llms.txt appendix + Layer 2B (robots.txt presets and llms.txt guidance)
- [x] 16-PLAN-03.md -- Webmaster tools submission appendix (GSC/Bing/Yandex/Naver) + Layers 3-4 + Machine-Readable Constraints

**Details:**
Requirements: IDX-01 through IDX-05 (5 requirements)
Research: Google confirmed NOT supporting IndexNow (Feb 2026). astro-indexnow v2.1.0 verified.

### Phase 17: API Integration Patterns

**Goal**: Genorah projects can securely connect to external services through server-side patterns that never expose secrets to the client
**Depends on**: Phase 13 (v1 complete -- independent of SEO phases)
**Plans**: 2 plans

Plans:
- [x] 17-PLAN-01.md -- SKILL.md Layers 1-2: Decision Guidance with integration type decision tree + code patterns for server-side proxies, CRM forms, email, Turnstile, webhooks, typed clients, and env management
- [x] 17-PLAN-02.md -- SKILL.md Layers 3-4: DNA connection, archetype voice variants for form UX, related skills + anti-patterns + machine-readable constraints

**Details:**
Requirements: API-01 through API-06 (6 requirements)
Research: HubSpot Forms API v3, Salesforce Web-to-Lead, Resend 6.9.x, Stripe/GitHub webhooks, Cloudflare Turnstile -- all verified.

### Phase 18: Dynamic OG Images & Pipeline Wiring

**Goal**: Branded social preview images generated from Design DNA tokens, and all v1.5 skills wired into the agent pipeline
**Depends on**: Phase 14, Phase 15, Phase 17
**Plans**: 4 plans

Plans:
- [x] 18-PLAN-01.md -- OG images SKILL.md Layers 1-2: Decision Guidance + code patterns for Next.js and Astro, 3 template types, font loading, signature elements
- [x] 18-PLAN-02.md -- OG images SKILL.md Layers 3-4: DNA connection, archetype composition families, pipeline position + anti-patterns + machine-readable constraints
- [x] 18-PLAN-03.md -- Agent pipeline wiring: section-planner, quality-reviewer, build-orchestrator, researcher, content-specialist, design-system-scaffold
- [x] 18-PLAN-04.md -- SKILL-DIRECTORY.md v1.5 milestone update

**Details:**
Requirements: OG-01 through OG-03 (3 requirements)
Research: Next.js opengraph-image.tsx file convention, Satori CSS limitations (flexbox only, no WOFF2), Astro Satori + sharp patterns verified.

### Phase 19: SSR & Dynamic Content Patterns

**Goal**: Sites handle frequent content updates, authenticated pages, and real-time data through correct SSR, ISR, and streaming patterns
**Depends on**: Phase 18 (pipeline wiring complete)
**Plans**: 3 plans

Plans:
- [x] 19-PLAN-01.md -- SKILL.md frontmatter + Layer 1 (Decision Guidance) + Layer 2A (core rendering patterns)
- [x] 19-PLAN-02.md -- SKILL.md Layer 2B: CMS webhook revalidation (5 platforms) + auth-gated rendering (4 libraries) + proxy.ts route protection
- [x] 19-PLAN-03.md -- SKILL.md Layers 3-4: DNA connection, archetype skeleton/shimmer variants + anti-patterns + machine-readable constraints

**Details:**
Requirements: SSR-01 through SSR-07 (7 requirements)
Research: Next.js 16 Cache Components (replaces PPR), cacheLife/cacheTag/updateTag APIs, proxy.ts (replaces middleware.ts), Astro Server Islands, Better Auth replaces Lucia -- all verified.

### Phase 20: Pipeline Wiring & Registry Completion (GAP CLOSURE)

**Goal**: Close all 5 integration gaps from v1.5 milestone audit
**Depends on**: Phase 19 (all skills complete)
**Plans**: 2 plans

Plans:
- [x] 20-PLAN-01.md -- Agent pipeline wiring: build-orchestrator, section-planner, quality-reviewer + SKILL-DIRECTORY.md registration + emotional-arc back-reference
- [x] 20-PLAN-02.md -- Documentation cleanup: REQUIREMENTS.md traceability, STATE.md, ROADMAP.md completion

**Details:**
Gap Closure: Resolved GAP-1 through GAP-5 from initial audit
- GAP-1: api-patterns + ssr-dynamic-content registered in SKILL-DIRECTORY.md
- GAP-2: Build-orchestrator Wave 0 expanded with search-visibility + dynamic content items
- GAP-3: Section-planner assigns integration_type from api-patterns
- GAP-4: Section-planner assigns rendering_strategy from ssr-dynamic-content
- GAP-5: Quality-reviewer has schema audit protocol (SDATA-06)

---

## Milestone Summary

**Key Decisions:**

- Replace seo-meta (not patch) -- existing skill too shallow for SEO-critical sites
- 3-skill split for SEO (seo-meta rewrite + structured-data + search-visibility) -- each justified by line count
- Framework-native only -- no react-helmet, next-seo, next-sitemap
- API integration as separate phase -- architecturally different from SEO skills
- Phase 17 independent of Phases 14-16 (SEO chain) -- allows parallelization
- CSS scroll-driven for IndexNow content-hash tracking
- Cloudflare Turnstile as sole spam protection (privacy-first, no reCAPTCHA)
- Cache Components as PPR replacement (Next.js 16)
- Better Auth noted as Lucia replacement
- All pipeline wiring changes strictly additive

**Issues Resolved:**

- seo-meta missing og-images in Related Skills -- added
- structured-data missing og-images in Related Skills -- added
- ssr-dynamic-content reference to non-existent cms-integration -- replaced with out-of-scope note
- build-orchestrator spawn template missing API/SSR context -- added
- SKILL-DIRECTORY api-patterns line count off-by-one -- corrected

**Issues Deferred:**

- None -- all 5 tech debt items from re-audit resolved inline

**Technical Debt Incurred:**

- None -- all gaps and tech debt resolved before milestone completion

---
